changes_made: Fixed ForceGraph2D width calculation - removed double-subtraction of sidebar widths
Graph now correctly fills the container which is already positioned with CSS (left-64, right-96 on desktop)
notes: The bug was that the container already accounts for sidebar widths via CSS positioning (left-64/right-96), so its getBoundingClientRect().width already gives the correct available width. The ForceGraph2D was then incorrectly subtracting 256px and 384px again, resulting in a canvas much smaller than the available space. Now the graph uses container dimensions directly and should fill edge-to-edge between sidebars.
